_meta.purpose: Self-contained handoff spec for the coach-hub-template project. Drop this into a fresh chat / new project and the agent can pick up scaffolding without re-deriving the architecture.
_meta.status: Design complete, ready for Phase 0 decisions then code

project.tagline: A plug-and-play mobile transformation hub for fitness/wellness coaches.
project.elevator_pitch: Like Linktree, but for fitness coaches. End user fills a form, clicks Build, gets a shareable URL with their own branded before/after stories and a dual-axis biometric chart that auto-renders from pasted-in data. Audience scans a QR, sees the coach's hub on their phone.
project.stage: v0.1 MVP scoping complete. No code written yet.

origin_project.name: Spokane Metabolic Momentum
origin_project.role: Reference implementation. One-off event app, complete and live.
origin_project.user_directive: Leave it alone. Treat as reference only. Build new template as a separate project / repo.

lift_verbatim.characteristics: Vanilla SVG. Dual y-axis (lb left, % right). End-of-line value labels in series color with collision avoidance. Auto-snap-to-nice axis values (50s/25s for lb, 5s for %).
Mobile-first (max-width 540px). Dark theme bg #1a252f, orange accent #f39c12. Photo grid -> headline stat cards -> chart card -> takeaway. Already collision-tested on real phones.

lift_verbatim.shape: Three series per transformation: weight (lb), bf (%), lean (lb). Each is array of [date_string, value] pairs.

architectural_decisions.path: C - JSON-driven static site with simple admin form

rejected.A: Template + git fork — too technical for non-developer coaches
rejected.B: Full SaaS — too heavy, too much ongoing burden, not zero-cost

auth.pattern: On Build, server generates a public slug AND a secret edit_token. Hub gets two URLs: a public read-only one (audience-facing) and a private edit one containing the token. Anyone with the edit URL can edit; anyone without can't. Pattern is proven by Pastebin, Imgur anonymous, etc.
auth.rationale: Coaches won't sign up. Plug-and-play means zero-friction. Edit-token UX is strictly better than email/password for this use case.

architectural_decisions.cost_target: $0 / month at small-to-moderate scale (tens of coaches, hundreds of audience scans per event)

tech_stack.frontend_framework_rationale: Static-first, compatible with free hosting, supports interactive 'islands' for the admin UI without going SPA-heavy
tech_stack.abuse_prevention: Cloudflare Turnstile (invisible CAPTCHA) on the Build form
tech_stack.optional_email_service: Resend (3000/mo free) — only used if coach opts into edit-link recovery email

in: N transformations per hub: name, before/after photos, before/after dates, paste-in weight/bf/lean time-series
Public hub URL: /h/{slug} — branded landing with story cards
Public transformation URL: /h/{slug}/{transformation-slug} — photos + dual-axis chart
Edit URL: /edit/{slug}?key={token} — returns coach to the admin form
Optional email field for edit-link recovery
out_for_v0_1: Raffle (defer to v0.2 once core validated; raffle is hardest piece)
Per-coach color palettes (use single brand palette in v0.1; let coach pick accent_color only)

columns.name: edit_token
columns.note: Long random secret. Server-generated. Required for any write.

rls_policies: Public SELECT on all three tables (anyone can read any hub)
All INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE blocked at table level
All writes go through Supabase Edge Functions that verify the supplied edit_token matches the hub's stored edit_token

build_first_hub: Fills form: hub name, host line, accent color, optional email

Adds 1+ transformations: name, dates, before/after photos (client-side compressed, uploaded to Supabase Storage), pastes time-series data (parsed client-side, previewed in a chart, saved as data_points)
Server runs create-hub Edge Function with Turnstile token, returns { slug, edit_token }
Coach lands on Success page showing both URLs with LOUD warning to save the edit URL: Copy / mailto: pre-filled / Download as .txt
audience_scan: Audience member scans QR code on a poster or TV slide
Sees branded hub with story cards
Sees photos + dual-axis chart auto-rendered from data_points
edit_existing_hub: Coach opens edit URL from bookmark / email
Renders the same admin form pre-filled with current data
Coach edits, hits Save, Edge Function checks token, writes update

build_phases.name: Decisions & accounts
tasks: Resolve open_decisions below
Create Cloudflare account
Create Supabase account
Buy/identify domain (or use *.pages.dev for v0)

build_phases.name: Skeleton + Build flow
tasks: New repo, Astro init, deploy to Cloudflare Pages on push
Supabase project: tables, RLS policies
Edge Function create-hub (validates Turnstile, generates slug + edit_token, inserts row)
Build form (no transformations yet)
Success page with both URLs and the loud-save UI

build_phases.name: Public read pages
tasks: Lift drawMultiChart from origin project into src/lib/chart.js
Lift story-page CSS into src/styles/story.css
Astro page /h/[slug] (fetches hub + transformations, renders story cards)
Astro page /h/[slug]/[transformation-slug] (fetches one transformation + data_points, renders photos + chart)
Validate by manually inserting Cearra-equivalent test data and confirming rendering matches origin app

build_phases.name: Admin UI
tasks: Page /edit/[slug] reading ?key= query param
Validates token via Edge Function (or client-side fetch with token, server confirms on save)
Hub edit form (name, host_line, accent_color)
Transformation list with add/edit/delete
Photo upload widget: client-side compress (browser-image-compression), upload to Supabase Storage via signed URL or Edge Function
Time-series paste box: textarea, parse 'date,value' or tab-separated lines, show preview chart, save as data_points
Get-my-links panel: copy buttons, mailto:, download .txt, QR download (qrcode.js)

build_phases.name: Polish + abuse prevention
tasks: Cloudflare Turnstile on Build form
Per-hub photo quota (max 12) and max file size 5MB
Onboarding example data when admin form is empty
Empty states + good error messages
Mobile-responsive admin (coach should be able to edit from phone)
Privacy page (we collect minimal data; explain it)

build_phases.name: Raffle (defer until v0.1 has real users)
tasks: Per-hub raffle: schema (raffle_entries with hub_id), entry form, wheel page
Lift wheel.html from origin project, generalize for any hub_id
Decide: per-coach Google Sheet (matches origin), or multi-tenant Supabase table (cleaner)

open_decisions_for_phase_0.question: Custom domain or *.pages.dev subdomain to start
open_decisions_for_phase_0.default_if_skipped: Free Cloudflare *.pages.dev for v0; bring own domain later

open_decisions_for_phase_0.question: Who writes the code — Claude, the user, or a hired dev
OK that uploaded photos are publicly readable by URL (Supabase Storage default)
Optional email for edit-link recovery, or 100% email-free
v0.1 — let coach choose only accent_color, or full color palette
open_decisions_for_phase_0.default_if_skipped: Accent color only. Full theming in v0.2.

design_principles: Zero technical knowledge required of the coach
10-minute setup test: coach should have a working hub from cold start in under 10 minutes
Loud save warning: edit URL must be saved before they leave Build success page
Dark theme with orange accent inherited from origin project; coach picks accent only
Chart is the hero artifact: auto-axis-snapping, real values, end-of-line labels, dual y-axis

abuse_prevention.spam_hubs: Cloudflare Turnstile on Build form (invisible captcha, free, ~30 min to add)
abuse_prevention.photo_storage_abuse: Per-hub photo limit (12), per-file size cap (5MB), client-side compression to ~500KB before upload
abuse_prevention.rate_limiting: Edge Function checks per-IP rate limit on create-hub (e.g. max 3 hubs/hour/IP)
abuse_prevention.edit_token_brute_force: Use cryptographically strong tokens (32+ char base62). 0% chance of guessing.

key_uncertainties_to_monitor: Cloudflare Pages free tier: 100k requests/day soft cap — fine for our scale, watch if it grows
Supabase free DB 500MB: thousands of transformations before hitting it
Supabase Storage 1GB: ~100-200 compressed photos depending on size
Slug collision policy: what happens if two coaches both want 'mike' (suggest auto-suffix or let them pick alternatives)
Recovery flow if coach loses both edit URL AND didn't provide email: documented as 'sorry, lost' in privacy page
lessons_from_origin_project_to_carry_for: Dual-axis chart with real values is the most compelling artifact — keep central
'Fat went, lean stayed' / 'metabolic transformation' is the brand voice
BF ranges differ wildly per person (Cearra 40-55%, Kolby 25-45%) — auto-compute axes per transformation
Photo before/after + chart together tell the story; neither alone is sufficient
Mobile QR scan is the primary entry point — test on real phones constantly
Print-ready posters and cue sheets were valuable for the event — generated artifacts could be a v0.2+ feature
Edit-token pattern is BETTER than auth for this audience — don't second-guess this decision
Rounded numbers caused inconsistencies in the origin project (40 vs 40.6) — store raw values, format at render time
first_concrete_action_after_handoff: Resolve the six open_decisions_for_phase_0 with the user. Then scaffold the new repo with Astro, set up the Supabase project, write the create-hub Edge Function and the Build form. That's Phase 1. Stop and demo before moving to Phase 2.
